title: Commodore drops Callback flip phone by $100 by defaulting to recycled memory chips and unbundling the earphones Callback 8020 drops to $399 as skyrocketing memory prices punish smartphone buyers

title: Asus' ROG Zephyrus G16 with an RTX 5070 & 240Hz OLED display is on sale for just $1,575 Save $575 on an excellent gaming laptop with a 16-core flagship CPU & top-tier build quality
summary: Best Buy is slashing almost $600 off a fantastic gaming laptop that basically has no compromises. It delivers solid performance across a wide variety of workloads and rocks a stunning 16-inch 240Hz OLED that can make anything look good. Asus has put 16GB of RAM and a 1TB PCIe 4.0 SSD onboard, too.

title: OpenAI's ChatGPT-5.6 gets the same banhammer treatment as Anthropic s Mythos from the federal government source says that Washington cautioned OpenAI against releasing the model without receiving approval
summary: The U.S. government wants dibs on U.S. AI labs' most powerful models, asking for access 30 days before they go public. OpenAI is voluntarily complying with the President's executive order but wants 'to achieve a more sustainable approach for future releases.'

title: Framework's Laptop 13 Pro DIY Edition now costs less than before, but a CPU price hike might be coming Cheaper PCIe 5.0 drives from Adata upgrade customers from 500GB to 1TB for free
summary: Framework has secured cheaper PCIe 5.0 SSDs for the DIY Edition of its Laptop 13 Pro, upgrading existing customers from 500GB to 1TB drives for free. Unfortunately, it seems like CPU prices are about to rise soon, which will make the laptop more expensive overall anyways.

title: Apple will skip its high-end M6 Mac chips and fast-track an AI-focused M7 generation for 2027, report claims may release a base M6 chip for entry-level Macs this year
summary: Apple will release a base M6 chip for entry-level Macs this year but skip the Pro and Max versions of that generation, jumping instead to an accelerated M7 family.

title: Solidigm VP talks PCIe 6.0 SSDs, next-gen floating gate NAND, liquid cooled storage and more Avi Shetty, VP of AI, Solutions & Market Enablement discusses the future of enterprise storage tech
summary: In an interview with Tom s Hardware Premium, Solidigm's Avi Shetty discusses the future of high-capacity SSDs, Floating-Gate NAND, PLC memory, PCIe 6.0 storage, liquid-cooled SSDs, Nvidia's Storage Next vision, and why the company believes AI will drive demand for even denser NAND flash-based storage technologies.

title: Microsoft extends free Windows 10 security updates for a second year program now ends on October 12, 2027
summary: Microsoft has extended its free consumer Windows 10 Extended Security Updates (ESU) program by a year, pushing the cutoff for critical security patches to October 14th, 2027.

title: GEEKOM A7 2026 Edition Review Part 3: Ubuntu 26.04 on an AMD Ryzen 5 7545U mini PC
summary: We ve just reviewed the GEEKOM A7 2026 Edition mini PC on Windows 11 after having checked out the hardware with an unboxing and a teardown in the first part of the review. We ve now had time to review the AMD Ryzen 5 7545U mini PC on Linux using Ubuntu 26.04 distribution. The Ubuntu 26.04 review includes feature testing, benchmarks, storage and networking (2.5GbE and WiFi 6) tests, and measurements of CPU temperature under stress, fan noise levels, and power consumption of the mini PC under various workloads. Ubuntu 26.04 installation We decided to install Ubuntu 26.04 alongside Windows 11 in dual boot configuration. To do so, we shrank the Windows (C:) partition to approximately half its size. We then inserted a USB drive flashed with the Ubuntu 26.04 ISO and began the installation process by entering the BIOS and selecting the drive. From there, the installation went smoothly, and we got [...] The post GEEKOM A7 2026 Edition Review Part 3: Ubuntu 26.04 on an AMD Ryzen 5 7545U mini PC appeared first on CNX Software - Embedded Systems News .
